title: From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering
abstract: I want to share my workflow for moving from vibe coding to agentic engineering. I will walk you through the process of defining a feature, exploring the UI in v0, integrating the code in Cursor, reviewing and refactoring the code, and testing, merging, and shipping the feature.
